name: Web security scanner for OWASP compliance with Markdown reports

parameters.content:
## n8n OWASP Security Misconfiguration Scanner

## How it works
This workflow performs a non-intrusive security audit of any public URL (typically a login or API endpoint). It sends a few safe and ethical HTTP requests and analyzes:
• Missing or weak security headers (HSTS, CSP, etc.)
• Dangerous HTTP methods & CORS misconfiguration
• Cookie security flags (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite)
• HTTPS enforcement and redirect behavior
• CORS preflight origin reflection
Results are compiled into a Markdown report and optionally emailed.

## Setup steps

Step 1.  Connect your Gmail credentials in the last node to auto-email the report
Step 2. Click Execute the workflow, or the 'Landing Page URL' and enter a URL + mail in the new window, then click 'submit'.

*You can alternatively download or receive the Markdown report directly from the Markdown to File node*

parameters.text:
=You are a professional report editor.

Improve the following markdown report:
Do NOT include internal reasoning or thinking.
{{ $('Create Markdown Report').item.json.markdown }}


- Fix formatting to html
- Make it more readable
- Add headings and structure
- Improve clarity and tone
- Keep it concise but professional

Return the final version in clean HTML

Return ONLY the final HTML.

=You are an expert Document Formatter. Your ONLY job is to take the provided text and redesign it into a formal html with a good styling for colors

Rules:

DO NOT change any of the facts, scores, or links provided in the original text.

DO NOT output any conversational text like 'Here is your format'.

Output ONLY the final designed format 

don't use \n to return to line or ** for bold
